author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit 3f988cc. Op::Replace/Op::Delete gain multiline field (serde default false; line-scoped ops can't express it at the type level). Matcher::find_replacements returns non-overlapping MatchSpans with capture-expanded replacements; splice-equivalence with Matcher::replace locked by proptest. engine::apply_multiline splices spans into the original buffer — separators outside matches untouched byte-for-byte, trailing newline preserved naturally, Change metadata (raw span bytes, 1-indexed start line, span context) always equals written bytes (the #89 invariant). Delete removes spans, not lines. line_range + multiline -> invalid_request. ~110 construction sites patched (compiler-diagnostic-driven script), fuzz_engine now fuzzes the multiline path. 20 new tests across engine/matcher/operation. All 23 suites green, clippy/fmt clean, fuzz workspace compiles. Unblocks #92.
